message:
fix(browser): update blocked surface count from 5 to 10

The browser profile now blocks 10 native-only surfaces (filesystem,
process, signal, IO_driver, blocking, server, gRPC, messaging, TLS,
database) after concurrent agent work added surface gating to
additional modules. Update the ex_browser_boundary.c example to
expect 10 blocked instead of the old hardcoded 5.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
